name: Boston Chicken Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh cranberries, sliced horizontally into 2 or 3 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-to-low heat, stir together the jellied sauce, marmalade, and ground ginger until melted, about 6-8 minutes.
2. Add the sliced cranberries, keeping the sauce on low. Stir often.
3. Continue cooking and stirring frequently until the cranberries are no longer white and taste tender to the bite (not soft, but not too crisp).
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. When cooled to lukewarm, refrigerate, covered, and use with a week to 10 days. Should freeze well for up to 4 months.
